mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dividend_payouts (user_id, stock_code, pay_date, holding_qty, per_share, gross_amount, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{stockCode}, #{payDate}, #{holdingQty}, #{perShare}, #{grossAmount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.user_id, d.stock_code, d.pay_date, d.holding_qty, d.per_share, d.gross_amount, d.status, d.reinvest_order_id, d.reinvest_amount, d.fail_reason, d.created_at, d.updated_at, s.stock_name FROM dividend_payouts d LEFT JOIN tradable_stocks s ON s.stock_code = d.stock_code WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY d.id DESC
